Video.summary: At the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, Tina Pisnik and Tammy Emmrich square off against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal match. Expect aggressive shot-making, quick court coverage, and intense chemistry on both sides as these athletes leave it all on the court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Video.summary: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault

Video.summary: NCPA Round of 64: University of California, Irvine vs University of Central Florida
Video.title: NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF

Image.alt: NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF
NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF
NCPA Round of 64: UCI vs. UCF

Video.summary: Heisman Trophy winner Danny Wuerffel teams up with pickleball pro Kyle Yates to take on filmmaker Doug Ellin and pro Wes Burrows in this exciting Picklebowl 2022 semifinal. Set on the scenic courts of Sea Island, Georgia, this match blends high-level pickleball with star power and charitable competition. Expect fierce play, fun commentary, and standout moments from both sides.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows

Video.summary: Meet Kris Heddings and the Gilbert Gladiators.
Video.title: S01E04 - Gilbert Gladiators

Image.alt: S01E04 - Gilbert Gladiators
S01E04 - Gilbert Gladiators
S01E04 - Gilbert Gladiators

Video.summary: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Video.summary: It's the final day of group stage matches on Super Sunday in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as game Number Six features Pune United battling the Hyderabad Superstars.This is an important game for both teams as they fight for the last remaining spots in the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: It's a high-stakes "Wednesday evening pickleball party" on Day 6 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as Pune United takes on the Chennai Super Champs at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. With both teams currently sitting low on the points table (fifth and sixth), this game is a crucial must-win for both, offering a chance for one team to gain much-needed inspiration and move up the standings.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Chennai - Day 6 Tie 1

Video.summary: In this US Open 2025 Pro Women's Doubles match, the Waters duo (Anna Lee Waters and Lee Waters) take on Amanda Rosati and Kaitlyn Campbell. The commentators highlight the Waters' dominant performance, particularly Anna Lee's disguised shots and aggressive play, as they secure a swift victory. They also discuss the challenges of the progressive draw format in pickleball and preview Anna Lee Waters' upcoming mixed doubles match with Andre Agassi.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Video.summary: This Pro Women's Doubles match at the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships features the dynamic team of Anna Leigh Waters and Lee Waters facing off against the formidable duo of Walczak and Harris. The Waters team, known for their aggressive play and powerful shots, including Anna Leigh's unique heavy topspin cross-court backhand roll, aim to dominate the court. Walczak, a native of Poland with collegiate tennis experience, and Harris seek to overcome the Waters' early lead and challenge their expected path to the Championship court.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Video.summary: Experience the excitement of the Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match on Championship Court. This video features a unique pairing of new partners Schull and Endara, who are familiar with the heat and come from a grinding three-game win in their last match. They face off against the formidable Lee Whitwell and Kafka. With Lee Whitwell's impressive hands and athleticism, and Kafka's hard-hitting forehand and topspin drives, this is a matchup you won't want to miss. Get ready for incredible rallies and a display of top-tier pickleball as these pros battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Video.summary: December 12, 2023 - Welcome to the second round of the semi-finals for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Scottsdale Scorchers.
Video.title: December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL
December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL
December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: October 30, 2023 - Welcome to week 6 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Tempe Tornadoes.
Video.title: October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL
October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL
October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: Tuesday Night Pickleball heats up as the Surprise Stingers go head-to-head with the Scottsdale Scorchers at The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health. Expect fiery team chemistry, quick-paced exchanges, and a crowd-ready atmosphere in this Arizona Pickleball League showdown.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball – Surprise Stingers vs Scottsdale Scorchers – April 18, 2023 | AZ PBL

Video.summary: In this action-packed Men’s Doubles match from Picklebowl 2023, Riley Newman and Josh Gartman face off against CJ Clinger and Tim Parks. These top pickleball players go head-to-head in a fast-paced, competitive match that features strategic plays, intense rallies, and plenty of drama. As the players represent their alma maters, the stakes are high as they battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Drew Fieldhouse and Dave Fleming highlights the strategic nuances of the game while adding expert insights into each player’s performance. Watch these elite athletes showcase their skills in this thrilling charity event for the Wuerffel Foundation.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, watch a thrilling collegiate pickleball battle between Purdue University and Creighton University. Tied at 2-2 entering the broadcast, this match features intense mixed doubles action that decides the series.Key matchups include Purdue’s Emma Jones and Jay Barath facing off against Creighton’s Russell Lee and Lucy. Later, Purdue’s Caleb Young and Tammy Lamb take on Creighton’s Noah Wodzinski and Elizabeth Cook.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
